name: Maho Hiyajou
description:
__Height:__ 140 cm (4’7”)

Another researcher at Victor Concordia University's Neuroscience Lab, similar to Kurisu. She attends a lecture at Okabe's university as Professor Leskinen's assistant.  ~! The same lecture drives Okabe into another conspiracy, after he had given up on his passion for time machines and for Kurisu!~
